stemHtml: Where does the VHF band fit within the radio frequency spectrum?

options.a: Immediately above the HF band and immediately below the UHF band.
options.b: Immediately above the MF band and immediately below the UHF band.
options.c: Immediately above the HF band and immediately below the EHF band.
options.d: Immediately below the SHF band and immediately above the HF band.
